response.justification: Szabo is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 19+ years of experience and strong recent work with the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React). His current role at re:cinq specifically involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, perfectly matching the job's AI development requirement. He demonstrates software craftsmanship practices, TDD culture, and has shipped production systems at scale. Minor gaps include unspecified familiarity with Nest.js and particular testing frameworks, but his proven architecture skills and testing mindset suggest quick adaptability.
strengths: Extensive full-stack expertise across TypeScript, Node.js, and React with proven production experience at scale
Current work on AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks directly aligns with job's AI development requirement
Strong software craftsmanship culture with TDD practices, open source contributions, and demonstrated mentoring through engineering talks
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned despite being primary stack requirement
Specific testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not listed; testing culture is strong but tools are unconfirmed
Authentication, authorization, and security best practices not highlighted in resume

key_factors.factor: AI agent infrastructure experience at re:cinq
Primary stack mastery (TypeScript, Node.js, React, databases, cloud)
Nest.js and specific testing framework gaps
